heading: Can Atlas be used with AWS Direct Connect?
body:
Yes. AWS (Amazon Web Services) PrivateLink powers Atlas Private Endpoints. This allows
for transitive connectivity. You can use [AWS Direct Connect](http://docs.aws.amazon.com/whitepapers/latest/aws-vpc-connectivity-options/aws-direct-connect-network-to-amazon.html) with your
VPC (Virtual Private Cloud) if you connected your VPC (Virtual Private Cloud) to Atlas via AWS (Amazon Web Services) PrivateLink.
